{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Horizon's eyes
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] has a cloud of unique eyes that hover behind her which are trophies from enemies.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
